source_jobs.title: Forward Deployed PM
source_jobs.description:
OVERVIEW

The ideal Forward Deployed Product Manager (FDPM) candidate is a customer obsessed AI product manager who thrives on our customers’ successful outcomes. You will spend most of your time talking to customers and connecting their technical requirements to the OneSchema product offerings. FDPMs ensure our customers’ success by building and delivering solutions that meet their needs. They translate customer feedback into internal product requirements for scalable products that land with customers.



In this role, you'll spend approximately 80% of your time embedded with client accounts, driving product strategy and execution over zoom or on-site, while dedicating the remaining 20% to internal product initiatives that strengthen our overall offering.




CUSTOMER JOURNEY

 - Engage directly with customers from fast-moving startups to large enterprises, to identify use cases and convert interest into long-term usage and expansion

 - Define and propose tailored solutions and proof-of-concepts (POCs) using Agents (Codex, Claude Code) to build high quality and interactive demos that demonstrate the value of OneSchema’s platform in real customer environments.

 - Lead onboarding and implementation efforts, including fine-tuning workflows, latency benchmarks, API integration, and infrastructure alignment.

 - Act as a trusted technical advisor to customers, helping shape their AI strategy using OneSchema infrastructure.



OneSchema Product Roadmap

 - Translate customer insights into structured product definition, identifying common themes and high-leverage feature requests.

 - Collaborate closely with engineering teams to align customer needs with technical roadmap

 - Drive execution of product development, ensuring that new products land successfully with customers

 - Oversee OneSchema roadmap, ensuring that reflects customer needs




MINIMUM REQUIREMENTS:

 - Strong technical background (CS/EECE background and/or production level development experience) or technical product management experience

 - Intimate familiarity with LLMs, fine-tuning, model inference, agents etc.

 - 2 - 5+ years of experience in products for software engineers (hiring at multiple levels for this role)

 - Strong customer interaction skills, deep customer success focus

 - Ability to communicate highly technical concepts to all kinds of audiences including the latest AI developments

 - Focus on driving outcomes, not just technical milestones

 - Ability to navigate complex customer/technical scenarios and come up with creative solutions




PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS:

 - Prior experience in technical product management roles with high degree of customer interactions

 - Interest in generative AI or developer tools

 - Early startup or founding experience

 - Prior technical leadership / technical PM experience

source_jobs.title: Head of Engineering
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT ONESCHEMA

More than 90% of all the enterprise data in the world lives in unstructured data, be it spreadsheets, PDFs, or documents. We see an incredible opportunity to be the AI document automation platform to eliminate the manual data entry work that persists across thousands of large enterprises today. We are a fast-growing startup backed by General Catalyst, Sequoia Capital, and Y Combinator. Our customers range from publicly traded companies (Toast, Dayforce) to fast-growing startups (Ramp, Vanta).



We have an ambitious, intense, fast-paced culture at OneSchema. As a rapidly growing venture-backed startup, every team member has the chance to have a major impact on our business. The ability to operate autonomously is an absolute must. With this level of autonomy, you’ll have the chance to learn in one week what it would take months to learn elsewhere.



This role will come with meaningful equity compensation. Our eng culture is in-person, and this role will be based in our SF HQ office 5x per week.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for a full-time Head of Engineering. As a member of the Leadership team, you will report directly to our co-founder and CEO. You will own the engineering roadmap, lead all software engineers at OneSchema, and set the pace, culture, and technical vision for the team.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Technical Vision & Roadmap: Translate company goals into a clear, ambitious engineering strategy; make build-vs-buy and architectural decisions that balance speed with long-term leverage.

 - Team building + coaching: Recruit, onboard, and mentor a diverse team of 5 → 20+ engineers across full-stack, product, infra disciplines; foster the extreme ownership and rapid learning culture that defines OneSchema.

 - AI & Platform Leadership: Guide the evolution of our React / TypeScript / Rust / Ruby stack and our usage of foundation models for coding and vision-language agents; own scalability, security, and compliance for Fortune-500 data workloads.

 - Execution Excellence: Establish lightweight but effective processes (planning, code health, on-call, incident response) that keep quality high while shipping daily.




WHO YOU ARE




ESSENTIALS:

 - 10+ years of professional software-engineering experience, including 3+ years managing and leading multi-team orgs in high-growth startups or fast growing teams.

 - Proven record scaling products from 0 → 1 → N, ideally in data-heavy domains.

 - Strong technical background in data-heavy applications and distributed systems

 - Passion for working on-site in a fast-paced, highly autonomous environment; comfortable juggling strategy and execution work.

 - Track record building inclusive, high-performance cultures that attract and retain top talent.




EVEN BETTER IF YOU:

 - Have shipped AI/LLM-powered products or internal agents at scale.

 - Have built customer-facing SDKs, APIs, or developer platforms.

 - Have experience selling to or working with large enterprises and their security/compliance requirements (SOC 2, HIPAA, etc.)

 - Are fluent in data-integration, ETL, or document-understanding problems




BENEFITS

 - Competitive compensation with meaningful stock options

 - Medical, Dental and Vision plans

 - Daily lunch in office

 - Monthly commuter cost reimbursement

 - 401k

 - Unlimited PTO and sick days

 - Parental leave

 - Quarterly wellness budget



OneSchema is an equal opportunity employer and encourages all applicants from every background and life experience. We celebrate diversity and do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics.

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT ONESCHEMA

More than 90% of all the enterprise data in the world lives in unstructured data, be it spreadsheets, PDFs, or documents. We see an incredible opportunity to be the AI document automation platform to eliminate the manual data entry work that persists across thousands of large enterprises today. We are a fast-growing startup backed by General Catalyst, Sequoia Capital, and Y Combinator. Our customers range from publicly traded companies (Toast, Dayforce) to fast-growing startups (Ramp, Vanta).



We have an ambitious, intense, fast-paced culture at OneSchema. As a rapidly growing venture-backed startup, every team member has the chance to have a major impact on our business. The ability to operate autonomously is an absolute must. With this level of autonomy, you’ll have the chance to learn in one week what it would take months to learn elsewhere.



This role will come with meaningful equity compensation. Our eng culture is in-person, and this role will be based in our SF HQ office 5x per week.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for a full-time Sr. Software Engineer. As an early member of our Engineering team, you will go 0 to 1 on our most important AI agent initiatives. You will be given a lot of autonomy, and the chance to learn in one week what it would take one month to learn elsewhere. Our stack consists of React, TypeScript, Rust, and Ruby. We work with all the popular foundation models to support both coding agent use-cases as well as vision language model use-cases.



You will report directly to our co-founder.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - You will go 0 to 1 on our newest AI agent, partnering directly with the Product and GTM team to unlock new automation opportunities in our large enterprise customers.

 - You will build delightful user interfaces in collaboration with our design team that make AI intuitive for our non-technical end users.

 - You will design, architect, and implement scalable infrastructure to meet the dynamic needs of our large enterprise datasets.

 - You will take ownership over the end to end execution of projects to delight customers with high quality AI applications.

 - You will work directly with our co-founders to understand the customer and make decisions on the product that will lead to a better user experience.


WHO YOU ARE


ESSENTIALS:

 - 3+ years of relevant full-stack software engineering experience

 - Comfortable with ambiguity. Excited about wearing multiple hats in a fast-moving environment. Able to hustle to drive results

 - Self-driven, self-motivated, fast learner. Ability to own open-ended projects end-to-end.


EVEN BETTER IF YOU:

 - Have experience with React, Ruby, Typescript, SQL, AWS, Rust

 - Have expertise with building AI applications and building AI agents

 - Have expertise building customer-facing SDKs, external APIs or other developer tools




BENEFITS

 - Competitive compensation with meaningful stock options

 - Medical, Dental and Vision plans

 - Daily lunch in office

 - Monthly commuter cost reimbursement

 - 401k

 - Unlimited PTO and sick days

 - Parental leave

 - Quarterly wellness budget



OneSchema is an equal opportunity employer and encourages all applicants from every background and life experience. We celebrate diversity and do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics.

notes: Small job board with a focus on engineering and product roles, indicating a strong tech core.
